definitions.text: To understand wrongly, taking one thing or person for another.
examples: Sorry, I mistook you for my brother. You look very similar.
Don't mistake my kindness for weakness.

definitions.text: To commit an unintentional error; to do or think something wrong.

examples: There were too many mistakes in the test, that unfortunately you failed.
He always did mistakes on purpose.

definitions.text: A pitch which was intended to be pitched in a hard-to-hit location, but instead ends up in an easy-to-hit place.
